creator: horikawa@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
I would like to introduce 3 Japanese books related to FreeBSD.
	o FreeBSD Install and Utilization Manual
	o FreeBSD User's Reference Manual
	o FreeBSD System Administrator's Manual

Fix: (1) Please apply attached diffs.
	(2) Please fetch title page graphics tarball
	    http://www.jp.freebsd.org/~horikawa/gifs.tar.gz,
	    extract *.jpg files, and move them to gifs/ directory.
	
How-To-Repeat: 
	<Code/input/activities to reproduce the problem (multiple lines)>
